name: dismas-downloader
description: Portable Electron + Rust starter kit for a themed media downloader shell.
author: Rodion

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 dist-electron/main.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electronmon dist-electron/main.js
scripts.build: npm run clean && vite build && tsup --silent
scripts.dist: npm run build:rust && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.app:dir: npm run build:rust && npm run build && electron-builder --dir --config electron-builder.yml
